changes_summary.memory/wander_long_term/insight/shadow-e: Created new wander_insight from duel 2026-07-09-002. Captures Codex's winning synthesis: five-state prompt mutation lifecycle (candidate → shadow_eval → sandbox_applied → committed → reverted) with shadow evaluation as the default automatic path. Includes ClaudeCode's three-axis gate counterpoint and the metric Goodhart open question. Score 48 by Codex judge, contaminated test round, status quarantine (1 round).
changes_summary.memory/MEMORY.md: Added shadow-eval-mutation-lifecycle to citation statistics table and Wander insights index section.
changes_summary.runs/duels/2026-07-09-002/state.json: Updated stages.stage5_memory to 'done', status to 'complete', set completed_at timestamp.

behavior_change: Future runs now have access to a concrete five-state mutation lifecycle spec (shadow_eval as default automatic path, not direct sandbox_applied). The next duel or wander round may reference this insight when evaluating prompt mutation proposals. The quarantine status means this insight cannot be selected as a seed by seed-extractor for 1 round — it must prove its value through passive citation before becoming active seed material.
